sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: usually brings decent fat support. that is one of the category strengths. easy to sprinkle into meals. that practical versatility matters. tiny food with serious nutrient density. seeds often overperform for their size.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: texture or prep can be a barrier. not everyone uses seeds consistently. calorie density still stacks up fast. tiny foods can still overshoot fast. real serving sizes are often small. some strong paper numbers are hard to cash out in practice.

closing.summary: Sunflower Seeds does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
